title: Carnivorous Origins Savior
description: A datapack that lets your carnivorous origins eat foods from modded sources.
body:
This project was made because I was unaware of [Dietary Delights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/origins-dietary-delights). Please use that instead.

Original description below:

---
Alright, let's set the scene.

You're joining a new server with some friends. You've got the Origins mod set-up, and you've chosen one that only eats meat. Your friend invites you over for a massive feast, with massive modded meals and- oh. You can't eat the roast chicken, even though it's... definitely meat. Hm. That doesn't seem right.

Sounds like something you've run into? This pack almost definitely fixes it. It covers Farmer's Delight, a multitude of its add-on mods such as Nether's Delight and End's Delight, Create: Garnished, Create: Estrogen, the Aether, the Bumblezone, Supplementaries, Hexcasting, Alex's Caves, Croptopia...
Is your food mod of choice not on this list? That's fine! Head on over to the GitHub and start an issue, and it'll be on my radar to add it to the list.

Oh, and don't worry, vegetarians; plenty of non-meat non-vegetable foods are also properly tagged as edible by all. You won't be missing your gummies, candies, estrogen, custard, alcohol or donuts with this datapack!

*None of the mods mentioned are required, meaning you don't need to add even more food mods just to use this!* It just slots right into your world, no additional setup required!
